memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB, not the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added to Brain later.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance for Brain.

details: Committed Brain DB as source of truth.
Committed Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as strict memory intake agent.
Preserved Telegram integration as an open question.
Preserved model cost/performance choice as an open question.
